deadlydelivery.description_text:
Your shift starts now. Good luck.

In Deadly Delivery, you and your fellow delivery goblins are tasked with delivering parcels into pitch-black mines full of... things. Armed with questionable equipment, you'll sneak, sprint, and scream your way through procedurally generated tunnels.

Features

💀 Deadly Co-op Missions
Team up with up to 3 other players in online co-op. Coordinate, deliver, and survive - or watch your coworkers get picked off one by one.

🔦 Physics based VR Horror

Built for VR with a physics based world, spatial audio, and proximity voice chat.
Haul a variety of parcels, climb on other players or give them a slap of encouragement

👹 Monsters With Personality
Face off against terrifying entities, some may even look and act like your teammates. Learn their patterns - or feed them your friends.

⛰️ Progression

Level up, upgrade your gear, grab a pet, unlock cosmetics!

prisonbossprohibition.human_name: Crime Shop Simulator: A Prison Boss Game
prisonbossprohibition.description_text:
Crime Shop Simulator: A Prison Boss Game brings the crafting and simulation antics of Prison Boss VR out of the slammer and onto the streets!

Welcome to New Yolk City,  a wonderful place to live, except that the Mayor has gone on a banning spree. Run a chain of stalls crafting legal and not-quite-legal merchandise,  all on a quest to conquer the black market and get super duper rich!

PLAY SOLO OR GET A PARTNER IN CRIME

You can become a self-made-egg, play in co-op with one of your friends… or recruit a totally reliable stranger from the internet.

CRAFT WITHOUT GETTING CAUGHT

Brew beer, roll cigarettes, and adapt as the Mayor flip-flops on what’s prohibited. But be careful—the New Yolk Police Department are intensifying their crackdown on contraband. If they catch you or your partner, they’ll seize your merchandise, and your business will be plucked!

EARN CASH AND BUILD YOUR REPUTATION

Sell your merchandise to everyone, from workers to the wealthy, to earn cash. Accept special jobs to boost your reputation among the different factions of the city. Build that street cred!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR SHOPS AND LOOKS

Now that you're rich, it’s time to get richer! Upgrade your shop and equipment to increase efficiency. Enhance your appearance to become the coolest cock-a-doodle-dude in town!

THE GAME WILL ALSO INCLUDE:

  • 3 different levels

  • 20+ items to craft

  • Leaderboards

… And more!

thrasher.description_text:
From the artist & composer behind the cult hit THUMPER comes THRASHER, a mind-melting arcade game sent to you from another world. Guide a magnificent space eel, elegantly swooping and thrashing it through mesmerizing alien landscapes. Race to evolve your eel from a tiny worm into a mega beast, taking on wild bosses through 27 stages across 9 psychedelic realms. Climb the leaderboards or simply vibe out inside the breathtaking landscapes. Experience the award-winning game on PC, Steam Deck and PCVR.

Features:

  • 27 stages across 9 realms
  • 3 game modes (Play, Play+, Time Trial)
  • A unique circle-based combo system to master
  • Precision mouse controls (and gamepad support)
  • Remastered Edition of the award-winning VR mode (with controller and hand tracking support)
  • Optimized for Steam Deck, running at 90fps

TRANSCEND SPACETIME BY EEL
Ride the space eel into a flow state where music, visuals, and gameplay merge into one experience. Journey from primordial gloom to celestial heights, ending in a confrontation with a cosmic entity.

YOU V THE UNIVERSE
Swoop, dash and thrash at high speed, breaking obstacles and chaining combos using the circle-based mechanic, leading to encounters with massive leviathans.

SOUND AND FURY
Lose yourself in the soundtrack by Brian Gibson of Lightning Bolt. A spatial audio and haptics showcase designed to create a full sensory experience.

CHILL OR CHALLENGE
Relax and enjoy the ride, or push for high scores with advanced combos. Try Time Trial or Play+ for extra difficulty.

MANY WAYS TO PLAY
PC: Gamepad and precision mouse controls
Steam Deck: 90fps with gamepad and trackpad
PCVR: Controllers and hand tracking support

crossings.description_text:
You awaken cold and weaponless in a realm shaped by death and memory. The air is thick with sap. The roots shift when you're not looking. And something old is watching.

This is the Norse afterlife—reborn as a VR roguelite. Fight, explore, and cross paths with others like you. No voice chat. No usernames. Just presence, movement, and trust.

Block, dodge, and strike your way through an ever-changing world of myth.
Claim weapons and spells, learn from each fall, and forge your path in seamless, wordless co-op.

In Crossings you cross paths with others—naturally appearing in the same world. Every player walks their own path, but when paths cross, your fates intertwine.

  • Seamless ambient multiplayer — no menus, no waiting.
  • Communicate with body language, combat, and attention.
  • Fight together without speaking — a bond formed in motion.
  • Split apart or stay close — your journeys intertwine.

Feel every swing, every hit, every dodge. Your body is your weapon—and your defense.
Master a growing arsenal and combine weapons with trinkets, spells, and consumables.

Weapons:

  • Swords, axes, clubs and bows with many variants.
  • Switch freely between melee, ranged, and spells.
  • Block, dodge, and counter enemies in real-time.

Magic Powers:

  • Cast fire, ice, roots, lightning, poison, and wind using a gesture-based system.
  • Chain powers together with combos.

Inventory & Strategy

Manage your resources, tweak your build, and bend fate to your advantage—or chaos.

  • Potions: Restore health and mana
  • Trinkets: Passive boosts and effects

Customize your run with modifiers for:

  • Damage, status effects, elements
  • Drop rates, loot rarity, rewards
  • Mana regen, spell behavior
  • Enemy types, spawn patterns

Some upgrades are predictable—others risky. Choose wisely or embrace the madness.

This world is not static. Each run reshapes it.

Between Each Run:

  • Choose a starting weapon
  • Customize your outfit
  • Select altar offerings with unique modifiers
  • Discover new paths and secrets

Die, learn, and push further.
Every death opens a new branch of the story.

Sap drips from the trees like blood. The roots twitch like veins. The forest waits.

It remembers what you were.
It watches what you become.

This is not the end. This is between.

prisonbossvr.description_text:
Prison Boss VR is a crafting and simulation game with one simple goal: make cash! Locked up in your prison cell, produce and sell contraband items to buy your freedom back. But don’t get caught by the guards!

Roll cigarettes, fill up bottles, write erotic letters, and more! Be sure to stash your goods well, or they will be seized by the patrolling guards!

Sell all the products of your hard illegal work to your fellow inmates. You can also use them to complete special jobs to earn reputation along with useful rewards!

Create your perfect workshop by freely placing the furniture you buy where you want it! Add some posters on the wall or lamps to give it some style! But keep it functional, you’ll need space to hide your contraband and your money stacks from the guards!

  • Unlock 11 craftable items
  • Complete 80 jobs across 4 different prisons
  • Play the game in Story, Arcade or Boss mode
  • Adapt your cell to the size of your VR playspace
  • Jazz along our awesome soundtrack
  • Make mama proud

Available for Arcades on SpringboardVR

budgetcutsultimate.description_text:
Zip, sneak, and stab your way through a heart-pounding dystopia filled with evil robots! What began as a cost-cutting strategy has spiraled out of control, and now it’s up to you to save humanity from being optimized out of existence.

Budget Cuts Ultimate is the essential VR action stealth game, containing all previously released games and content updates.

  • Seamlessly play through all 13 levels in the main story of both Budget Cuts 1 and 2, with over 10 hours of stealth stabbing action!
  • Mutators allow you to customize your gaming experience with everything from Infinite Stabby Crystals, Locomotion Preferences, Gravity Settings, Bullet Time and “Paltkoma” mode.
  • Arcade mode includes a local high score system, 5 replayable levels, 3 difficulty settings, and a “budget calculator” scoring system.
  • Discover and take advantage of many weapons: knives, bow and arrows, grenades, and throwable objects like coffee cups.

As your last human co-worker is hauled away, a mysterious briefcase from someone on the outside is delivered to your desk. You need to get to the bottom of what is going on at TransCorp.

Sneak around enemy robots by climbing through air ducts and service tunnels, or embrace violence with knives, arrows, grenades, and coffee mugs. Once you’ve completed your mission, test your skills in the arcade with multiple modes and difficulty levels.

maestro.description_text:
Become the Maestro!

Conduct a full orchestra in VR with groundbreaking hand-tracking, using real conducting technique!

Step onstage in fully rendered interactive concerts and experience total visual and auditory immersion in epic symphonic performances.

Shape your experience ! Unlock dozens of stages, costumes, gloves, and batons to customize every concert!

Meta's "Game of the Year 2024", Maestro redefines VR rhythm games, praised by both players and critics for its innovative gameplay and emotional depth.

From Beethoven to Vivaldi, from Star Wars to Harry Potter, play through 30 unforgettable tracks. Classical, cinematic, iconic…

 Choose your experience: Start with the base game and add the DLCs you like, or get the complete bundle at a special price.

cubism.description_text:
Challenge your mind in Cubism, a deceptively simple VR puzzle game where you assemble increasingly complex shapes out of colorful blocks.

Immerse yourself in a Zen environment as you reason your way through 60 puzzles which will put your spatial thinking skills to the test.

thelightbrigade.description_text:
Enlist in the ranks of The Light Brigade, humanity’s last line of defense, and journey through procedurally-generated battlegrounds as many times as it takes to free the souls of the fallen trapped within.

Realistic gunplay inspired by historical World War weaponry creates tense battles against increasingly difficult enemy soldiers, creatures, and bosses. In VR, aiming, shooting, and reloading bolt-action rifles, machine guns and pistols feels highly immersive and tactile.

Powerful light magic pairs beautifully with gunplay. From infusing your rifle's bullets with light magic to raining fireballs on enemy hordes, magic spells complement your rifle by adding more combat tools to your arsenal.

Start your run with a standard-issue rifle and loot for powerful attachments like explosive charms, poison gun barrels, tactical scopes, silencers, and more. If you fall to enemy fire, survive long enough to retrieve your fallen soul or lose your run progress to permadeath.

Cleanse the souls of the fallen to climb the ranks of The Light Brigade and spend rank points to upgrade your weapon, passive abilities, and spells. Unlock new player classes and gain access to new weapons, loadouts and play styles, adding even more variety to your runs.

Loot treasure chests and enemies during your run to collect an array of magical tarot cards, each with unique powers, buff/debuffs and passive abilities. Acquire stronger versions of these cards to create devastating stacking effects.

Infinitely procedurally-generated battlegrounds make each run completely unique, forcing you to traverse carefully through ever-changing hostile environments. Enemy soldiers lurk around every corner, so position and strategy is crucial for survival.

What led to the world's downfall? What do the Obsidian Forces want? Uncover these mysteries and bring the world back from the brink of total darkness before it's too late.

We've been hard at work on future updates and are currently in production on a wide variety of post-launch content. Given the modular design of our roguelike system, it is fun & seamless to continuously add more to the game. So expect new content in the form of new biomes/worlds, enemies, guns/weapons, unlockable player classes, attachments, online features, items, as well as general improvements to the user experience.

If you'd like to stay updated on our development, you can follow along by joining our Discord.

stopaapihate.description_text:
Donations to support Stop AAPI Hate, through their fiscal sponsor Chinese for Affirmative Action, are made to the PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Stop AAPI Hate is a national coalition addressing anti-Asian racism across the U.S. The coalition was founded by the Asian Pacific Policy and Planning Council (A3PCON), Chinese for Affirmative Action (CAA) and San Francisco State University’s Asian American Studies Department. Between March 19, 2020 and February 28, 2021, Stop AAPI Hate has received 3,795 reported incidents of racism and discrimination targeting Asian Americans across the U.S. Visit stopaapihate.org.

The Stop AAPI Hate name and emblem are used with its permission, which in no way constitutes an endorsement, express or implied, of any product, service, company, opinion or political position. The Stop AAPI Hate logo is a registered trademark owned by the Stop AAPI Hate campaign.

knittingpocketguide.description_text: Leisure Arts Knitting Pocket Guide eBook- Knitters will love this laminated handy reference guide to needles, yarns, and stitching techniques. Stitches include: knit, garter, stockinette, reverse stockinette, seed, twisted, slipping stitches, and even ribbing. Originally published as LEA56004 Knitting Pocket Guide. 12 pages, PDF download.

The Heavy Metal Kit features 105 assets, 39 PBR materials, and 116 textures to sail to impossible worlds

Imagine floating cities of the future, derelict kingdoms in the middle of the desert, or civilizations forgotten about at the bottom of the ocean.

Use this kit’s timeless textures, organic shapes and fluid structures to create new and old worlds lighter than air, faster than wind and bursting with potential!

Features: •105 Quality Assets • 39 PBR Materials • 116 Textures • Unique Handcrafted Assets • Compatible with Windows, Mac and All Major Software

Texture Sizes: • 1K, 2K and 4K

Bustling with art deco, contemporary, and futurist influences this NEO New York City is full of palatial public libraries, science institutes, avant-garde office buildings, vogue high-rises, museums, skyscrapers, sprawling residential towers, opulent hotels, and more!

Envision utopian technological worlds with bright LEDs, holograms, and lush courtyards, or set the stage for the next brooding sci-fi neo-noir mystery.

Features: • 143 Quality Assets • 109 Quality PBR Materials • 793 Textures • Unique Handcrafted Assets • Compatible with Windows, Mac and All Major Software

This mysterious apothecary wagon is the go-to transport for herbalists, potion-makers, and wandering healers.

Laden with potion bottles, wooden crates, and healing herbs, this 3D model exudes an air of magic and mystery.

colonial.description_text:
Reimagine times of excess with 54 high quality assets, 17 PBR materials and 189 textures!

These grand structures borrow from the traditions of Palladian and Regency architecture with their use of beautiful pediments, archways, pillars, Venetian windows, masonry domes, and lofty and complex towers.

With a variety of copper, brass, stone, and brick textures to choose from, you can give your world a Roman, Federal, or even otherworldly flair.

Features: • 54 Quality Assets • 17 PBR Materials • 189 Textures • Unique Handcrafted Vehicle • Compatible with Windows, Mac and All Major Software

Music on the Move!

Whether parading through cobblestone streets or setting up outside a lively tavern, this band wagon is the heart of traveling entertainers.

With all the noise-making essentials including drums and a giant brass tuba, this 3D model is perfect for bards, minstrels, and carnival performers.

girlswhocode.description_text:
Donations to support Girls Who Code are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Girls Who Code, a nonprofit organization, was founded in 2012 to encourage more young women to complete a college-level computer science education and gain skills to further enhance their employability. Mobilizing leading executives, educators, and engineers, Girls Who Code has developed a new model of computer science education designed to inspire, educate, and equip girls of all experience levels and backgrounds with the skills to succeed in the field.

In just three years, Girls Who Code has already begun to move the needle: through rapid iteration and expansion of our Summer Immersion Program and highly-scalable Clubs Program, Girls Who Code has delivered 3,000+ hours of instruction to 3,000+ girls nationwide. Our programs have earned support from the CEOs of top Fortune 500 companies, engaged 700+ industry professionals, delivered among the most robust dataset on computer science education, and been featured in 100+ publications, from The New York Times to the Today Show. Our alumnae are overwhelmingly choosing to major in computer science or related studies and consistently name Girls Who Code's programs as their chief incentive to do so.

Girls Who Code is dedicated to closing the gender gap in the technology world. Supporting the work of Girls Who Code is an opportunity to empower the engineers, innovators, and executives of tomorrow.

ancients.description_text:
Revive lost civilizations with 66 quality assets, 16 PBR materials and 48 textures!

Create the weathered temples of South America and Asia’s past or branch outside our planet and construct mystifying alien lands with numerous temple facades, structures, dwellings, arches, pillars, and much more.

Whether you want Mayan civilization or sci-fi alien worlds, this Kit’s cracked stone and patina-covered pieces will make your imaginative world seem real!

Features: • 66 Quality Assets • 16 PBR Materials • 48 Textures • Unique Handcrafted Vehicle • Compatible with Windows, Mac and All Major Software

Texture Sizes: • 1K, 2K and 4K

Supported Software: • Unreal Engine (5.0 – 5.6) • Blender (Eevee, Cycles) • Unity (URP & HDRP) • Houdini (Mantra, Karma) • Cinema 4D • Autodesk Maya, 3ds Max • Octane, Redshift, V-Ray, Arnold

shangrila.description_text:
Create legendary realms with 59 quality assets, 31 PBR materials and 95 textures!

Invoke the fantasies of Eastern myth, create the mountain top villages of isolated paradises, and build otherworldly realms that spring from ancient folklore.

Use this kit’s magnificent temples, ceremonial structures, fantastical rooftops, elaborate village squares, and much more to bring your hidden kingdoms above the clouds to life!

Features: • 59 High Quality Assets • 31 Quality PBR Materials • 95 Textures • Unique Handcrafted Assets • Compatible with Windows, Mac and All Major Software

militaryopsmaterials.description_text:
Built for Boots, Barricades, and Battlefields with 20 Military Materials!

This collection of 20 Military Materials brings together a rugged and battle-tested set of surfaces designed for crafting authentic military environments, vehicles, and equipment.

Drawn from real-world military gear and construction, including fabrics, metals, tarps, cables, and sandbags, this Kit offers a grounded and gritty look, perfect for both hard and soft surface modeling.

Features: • 20 PBR Materials • Compatible with Windows, Mac and All Major Software

humanvoices_audiohero.description_text: This collection captures the full spectrum of authentic human expression—from laughter and tears to coughs, yawns, whispers, and screams. Babies crying, friends cheering, lovers sighing. Painful groans, panicked yells, and the quiet weight of a deep breath before speaking. No actors, no filters, just life.

droneandswarmbehaviour.description_text: "Drone & Swarm Behavior" is a pack of mechanical and insectoid sound effects for sci-fi. It features the propeller hum of micro-drones, the unsettling buzz of alien swarms, and the servo clicks of small robots, creating the sonic presence of autonomous machines and hive-minded threats.

edm.description_text: Lose yourself in the pulsating rhythms of this expertly curated EDM playlist. It spams genres like electro house, dubstep, trance and more. Get ready to turn up the energy and experience an electrifying EDM adventure with this 50 tracks of hard hitting beats and motivational moods. From uplifting vibes to aggressive pulsating melodies this playlist will put you in the perfect mindset to power through any workout, commercial or advertising task, or night out. Turn up the volume and feel the beat!

happyfeelgood_audiohero.description_text: Toe-tapping acoustic pop, bouncy indie folk, and tropical house that makes you want to dance around the kitchen. Handclaps, whistling, ukulele, and glockenspiel. Skipping through the park. Rolling down the highway with the windows open. Good friends, lazy afternoons, and that burst of joy when everything just clicks. Weekend content, summer reels, feel-good commercials, and creators spreading smiles.

heartfeltintensity.description_text: Fifty tracks of aching solo pianos, weeping strings, haunting pads, and tragic melodies that don't just play — they bleed. From quiet, fragile moments of reflection to overwhelming waves of sorrow and grief. Whether you're scoring a funeral scene, a broken relationship, or a character at their lowest point, this collection delivers the kind of pain you can't fake.

atmosphericburn.description_text: Raw, raging, and revved up. Heavy rock riffs, feverish guitars, and driving drums that hit like a fist through drywall. From confident, strutting anthems to desperate, distorted meltdowns—this is the sound of adrenaline, anger, and attitude. Perfect for action montages, aggressive gaming content, high-energy trailers, and creators who want their visuals to burn hot and loud. No brakes. No apologies. Just fire.

children.description_text: Bouncy. Bright. Pure, unfiltered happiness. Ukuleles and handclaps. Pizzicato strings and jingle bells. Wobbly trombones and sparkly music boxes. Toe-tapping indie folk, silly reggae pop, and lullabies that whisper "sleep tight." This collection is a playground of sound—carefree, whimsical, and bursting with giggles. Nap time. Playtime. Anytime little ones need a smile. No grown-up stuffiness. Just joy.

ominousovertures.description_text: From frightening horror underscores and bass-driven confusion to pulsating apocalyptic force and determined battle cries, this collection is engineered for trailers where tension boils over and games where every decision is critical.

indierock_audiohero.description_text: No stadiums. No ego. Just 25 tracks of honest, scrappy, heart-on-sleeve indie rock. From jangly, carefree guitar strums and bouncy retro vibes to moody, yearning anthems for those cold sober nights. Driving rhythms, warm distortion, and melodies that stick with you long after the song ends.

blockbusterbeasts.description_text: Unleash raw, cinematic power. This pack of explosive tracks is your ultimate weapon for high-octane storytelling, blending skull-crushing metal, driving orchestral action, and gritty rock anthems to fuel everything from epic sports highlights and brutal trailers to intense gameplay and investigative thrillers. Command the energy. Dominate the scene.

cosmichorrortech.description_text: Cosmic Horror Tech – a playlist of glitched-out dread. Features cosmic swells, void rumbles, and digital malfunctions. Soundtrack your alien signal from the void, corrupted AI, or tech overwhelmed by something ancient.

quantumleap.description_text: From glitching cyber-suspense and eerie sci-fi soundscapes to pulsing corporate intrigue and Eastern-tinged noir, this collection is engineered for hacking sequences, neural interfaces, and scenes where reality glitches. Bend perception. Code the future.

africaandjungles.description_text: Untamed. Alive. Unforgiving. Insects sizzle, parrots scream, and drums pulse through dense, breathing green. Heavy with birds and hidden movement—this isn't a safari postcard. It's the raw throat of the wild. Nature docs, survival games, world-building content, creators who want their audience to feel the heat, the humidity, and the eyes watching from the dark. No trails. No guides. Just jungle.

weatherwounds.description_text: Want to capture the harsh, lonely beauty of wounded weather? This moves from the quiet ache of falling snow and a light, splattery drizzle to the fierce howl of arctic winds and a heavy blizzard's whip. It builds with deep, moaning gusts through a wooden barn, the sharp crack of lightning, and the distant rumble of desert thunder.

wackyworld.description_text: Inject Fun. Bring your projects to life with a burst of playful energy and animated charm. Packed with classic cartoon zaps, whimsical whistles, rubbery stretches, and hilarious vocal effects. Perfect for adding character to animations, scoring comedic moments, or creating a lighthearted vibe.

echoesfromepsilon.description_text: "Echoes from Epsilon" is a cinematic sci-fi treasure for psychological tension and cosmic melancholy. It moves from heartbreaking orchestral laments to tracks of creeping, percussive dread—scoring deep-space isolation, derelict ships, and unseen threats. Perfect for stories of loss, regret, and slow-burning paranoia in the void.

spacehord.description_text: Fuel your sci-fi epics and ambient journeys. This collection of 12 atmospheric tracks is your command center for the cosmos, blending deep-space tension, eerie ambience, and driving electronic pulses to score everything from interstellar horror and cyberpunk tension to serene orbital vistas and introspective dreams. Launch your next visionary project.

buttonmasters.description_text: Tiny clicks, big energy — this 25-track collection is all about the satisfying art of the button press. From simple push clicks and springy beeps to futuristic console blips, telemetry switches, laser ion clicks, scanner buzzes, and video game surges.

childrenandplay.description_text: Fill your scenes with the hilarious, chaotic symphony of childhood. This collection captures everything from the wild screams of a playground free-for-all and the joyous pandemonium of a school cafeteria to the distinct splash-fight ambience of an indoor pool. It’s the unfiltered, energetic soundtrack of kids causing beautiful mayhem, perfect for adding a dose of playful, authentic chaos.

crowdscenesnegative.description_text: This pack delivers the intense sounds of shock and fear—sharp gasps, panicked whispers, and full-blown terror screams from both adults and children. It's your essential toolkit for scenes of sudden crowd distress and horror.

gravityandpropulsion.description_text: Gravity & Propulsion – a playlist of deep-space motion. Get gravity flux drones, anti-gravity swirls, and heavy rocket launches. Soundtrack your FTL spool-up, orbital docking, or escape pod burn.

miningcoloniesonplanets.description_text: Mining Colonies on Planets – a sci-fi playlist of industrial work. Rock drills, tunnel echoes, and clattering machines soundtrack your frontier outpost, asteroid dig, or deep-core drilling site.

robotsinaction.description_text: "Robots in Action" is a set of robotic motion and servo sound effects for sci-fi. It features precise servo whirrs, heavy android footsteps, and the whines of mechanical activation—creating the sound of obedient drones, patrolling sentries, and intricate robotic articulation in motion.

enchantedlands.description_text: This collection of 12 ethereal tracks is your sonic key to mystical realms, blending delicate fantasy tones, serene spiritual hymns, and playful childhood wonder to score everything from enchanted trailers and magical gameplay to heartwarming animated stories. Unlock the door to your next creative adventure.

legendarythemes.description_text: The definitive source for heroic storytelling, blending triumphant orchestral fanfares, poignant emotional themes, and determined ceremonial marches to score everything from legendary game trailers and blockbuster film moments to heartfelt documentaries and inspiring brand campaigns. Elevate your narrative. Become legendary.

exoticweaponexperiment.description_text: "Exotic Weapon Experiment" is a pack of high-tech sci-fi weaponry sounds, featuring antimatter whooshes, neutrino gunfire, and metallic burst effects. This creates the sonic identity of advanced energy weapons, particle cannons, and experimental armaments in futuristic combat.

conflictandbattle.description_text: In this collection you will find visceral mix of relentless machine gun fire, heavy artillery explosions, and the distinct crack of Civil War muskets. The soundscape layers intense battle ambiences with close-up bullet impacts, roaring crowd yells, and the specialized destruction of modern naval cannons and flamethrowers. It captures total auditory warfare, from medieval clashes to modern street battles.

symphonicmajestic.description_text: Symphonic Majestic is a collection of history's most powerful compositions, from Mozart's soaring arias and Vivaldi's exultant concertos to Tchaikovsky's sweeping romanticism. This is the definitive source for unparalleled elegance, heroic fanfares, and profound emotional depth. Convey greatness.

lunarlandscapes.description_text: Cold. Desolate. Otherworldly. Drifting drones, alien echoes, and haunting planetary winds across an empty silver surface. From deep cave rumbles to ghostly ethereal resonances, this is the sound of standing on a world that wasn't made for you. Perfect for sci-fi horror, space exploration content, atmospheric game environments, and creators who want their visuals to feel lonely, massive, and beautifully strange. No oxygen. No gravity. Just void.

cinematicscores.description_text: Fuel your narratives with high-stakes emotion. This collection delivers driving action themes, haunting moments of regret, desperate chases, and the powerful relief of victory. Perfect for trailers, scenes of conflict, and epic storytelling.

hospitalhum.description_text: Need to build a tense medical drama? This delivers the flatlining heart monitor, sharp ER radio chatter, the sterile hum of vintage equipment, and the tense quiet of an empty hospital room. Layer in every beep, breath, and distant voice to create unparalleled realism.

foley.description_text: From footsteps across every surface — cement, concrete, wood, dirt, leaves, metal, and stairs — to the sounds of doors opening, closing, locking, and knocking. Plus typing on keyboards, clicking mice, pouring drinks, turning book pages, sitting in chairs, lighting matches and cigarettes, breaking glass, running water, jingling keys, clapping hands, body falls, and even a fly buzzing around a microphone.

extraterrestrialenergy.description_text: "Extraterrestrial Energy" is a pack of alien soundscapes and creature vocalizations, featuring pulsating ray drones, eerie alien cries, and mechanical life-form breaths. This builds the unsettling audio presence of non-human entities, from mysterious beings to their biomechanical technology.

10downloadcreditsaudiohero.description_text: Get access to over 300,000 tracks of royalty-free music and sound effects with your Tier 2, which gives you 10 downloads of your choice!

calmandhealing.description_text: This collection cultivates a soundscape of deep tranquility and restoration. It layers ethereal, angelic choirs and soft synthetic drones with the pure, resonant tones of Tibetan chimes and vintage wind chimes. Gentle sonar pings and the rhythmic, soothing bubbles of a spa jet complete this immersive atmosphere designed for calm, meditation, and healing.

essentialcreatortoolkit.description_text: Step into any scene with the Essential Creator Toolkit — a curated collection of 20 real-world ambiences. Whether you need the cozy murmur of a French café, the steady hush of rain on a window, the distant roar of city traffic, or the quiet stillness of a library study hall, this playlist has you covered.

arcadeanthems.description_text: Blending punchy chiptune beats, cheerful retro rock, and triumphant victory themes. From frantic level clears and busy digital afternoons to celebratory win screens, this collection is your high-score soundtrack for gaming content, tech reviews, and vibrant, upbeat projects. Power up.

herosjourney.description_text: This powerhouse collection of 12 tracks is your all-access pass to cinematic greatness, blending pulsing electronic tension, timeless orchestral grandeur, and global rhythms to fuel everything from blockbuster trailers and intense gameplay to viral content. Stop searching and start creating—your saga starts here.

news.description_text: Driving rhythms, confident fanfares, and strategic builds designed for breaking headlines and in-depth reporting. Urgent political updates. Triumphant sports recaps. Solemn discoveries. Global overviews. This collection delivers the sonic gravity that serious journalism demands. Broadcast news, documentary segments, corporate presentations, and professional content that requires credibility, urgency, and impact.

neuromancersdreams.description_text: "Neuromancer's Dreams" is a moody electronic pack for tech-noir intrigue and urban introspection. This collection blends brooding synth ambience, pulsing electro-funk, and tense investigative cues—perfect for stylish cybernetic journeys, hacker’s trances, and navigating the neon-lit back alleys of a digitized future.

adrenalinerush.description_text: Adrenaline Rush delivers tracks of raw, unfiltered sonic aggression, blending pummeling rock, savage electronic pulses, and brutal sports anthems engineered for maximum impact. Soundtrack the final push, the game-winning play, and the high-octane chase. Drop the beat. Start the riot.

phantomfreight.description_text: "Phantom Freight" is a dark suspense playlist for sci-fi horror and cosmic dread. This collection of eerie drones, ticking-clock tension, and explosive percussive scares is designed for haunted spacecraft, derelict outposts, and encounters with unknowable, malevolent entities in the void.

make_a_wish.description_text:
Donations to support Make-A-Wish are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Make-A-Wish® creates life-changing wishes for children with critical illnesses. We seek to bring every eligible child's wish to life because a wish is an integral part of a child's treatment journey. Research shows children who have wishes granted can build the physical and emotional strength they need to fight their illness. Headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, Make-A-Wish is the world’s leading children’s wish-granting organization, serving children in more than 50 countries worldwide. Together, generous donors, supporters, staff and more than 40,000 volunteers, grant a wish every 17 minutes, on average, somewhere in the world. Since 1980, Make-A-Wish has granted nearly 450,000 wishes to children; more than 30,000 last year alone. For more information about Make-A-Wish International, visit worldwish.org and for more information about Make-A-Wish America, visit wish.org.

ventsandresonance.description_text: Vents & Resonance – the sci-fi collection for gritty atmosphere. Get industrial vent blasts, echoing metal hits, and deep reactor hums. Soundtrack your cyberpunk city, derelict starship, or hidden bunker with raw, textured noise that feels fresh, cool, and immersive.

colonysunrise.description_text: "Colony Sunrise" is for the dawn of new frontiers. This collection features expansive, hopeful themes with gentle piano, panoramic strings, and earthy rhythms—perfect for first steps on an alien world, establishing a new settlement, and the inspiring, wide-open promise of a fresh start among the stars.

asmressentials_audiohero.description_text: Gentle whispers from children and adults, soft tooth brushing and hair brushing, paper tearing, fabric rustling, curtain slides, a trickling shower, shaving cream spray, and even a wire brush scraping wood — all captured up close. Perfect for relaxation videos, sleep aids, sensory content, or any creator looking to trigger that satisfying, brain-tingling response

1000downloads.description_text: Get access to over 300,000 tracks of royalty-free music and sound effects with your Tier 3, which gives you 1000 downloads of your choice!

dramascenes.description_text: Profound intimacy and minimalist tension, designed for the heart of the story. From haunting, suspended atmospheres and melancholic indie strolls to tender, tear-jerking piano motifs, this collection scores the unspoken—the quiet confessions, the lonely struggles, and the raw, human reveals.

actionpacked.description_text: An arsenal of high-voltage anthems built for velocity and victory. From driving electro-rock and grinding industrial tech to defiant sports swagger, this collection is engineered to power your most intense sequences—think championship highlights, cyberpunk pursuits, and trailer moments that hit like a fist. Dominate the frame.

shadowsfall.description_text: From creeping atmospherics and unsettling world rhythms to jumbled, anxious soundscapes and sinister urban pulses, this collection is meticulously designed for horror intros, investigative thrillers, and scenes where every shadow holds a secret. Build the tension. Let the fear breathe.

pop.description_text: This 30-track pop collection delivers feel-good energy from start to finish. Expect crisp acoustic guitars, infectious synth hooks, future bass drops, handclaps, vocal chops, and driving beats built for summer vibes, lifestyle content, and commercial appeal. From breezy indie-pop and cheerful acoustic grooves to high-energy electronic anthems, these tracks are polished, upbeat, and engineered to make any project shine.

warpanddrumsadventures.description_text: "Warp & Drums Adventures" is a percussive treasure for primal sci-fi and high-stakes journeys. This collection drives forward with tribal ensembles, tense orchestral strikes, and eerie, building rhythms—perfect for planetary exploration, ancient alien rituals, and tense, drum-led pursuits across strange new worlds.

directorsaudiences.description_text: This set delivers the authentic, nuanced sounds of a live audience. It captures the anticipatory murmur of a crowd settling in, the rustle of movement in wooden seats, and the scattered coughs of a quiet theater. The emotional range extends from polite, pre-concert clapping to enthusiastic ovations and the collective, sympathetic "aww" of a vintage recording. It's the complete sonic backdrop of a captivated audience, from arrival to exit.

moviemagic.description_text: From heartbreaking solo piano and melancholic strings to triumphant orchestral anthems with driving percussion, soaring brass, and heroic choirs. Whether you need dark suspense, hopeful inspiration, dramatic tension, or full-throttle trailer energy — for adventure, fantasy, documentary, drama, or emotional storytelling — this collection delivers the emotional backbone your project deserves.

urbanbeats_audiohero.description_text: Turn up the volume with Urban Beats - the hottest new music playlist bursting with the freshest urban tunes. This pulse-pounding collection features the illest beats and most fire flows from today's top rappers and producers. The driving basslines and hypnotic rhythms will get your energy pumping. With a mix of club bangers, chill trap and old school classics, these fresh urban flavors have something for all fans of modern hip hop. Urban Beats is created for music lovers craving the newest and best rhythms. Bring on the urban fire!

lifestyle_audiohero.description_text: Good vibes only. Toe-tapping acoustic pop, laid-back indie folk, and tropical house that feels like a permanent vacation. Handclaps and finger snaps. Whistling choruses and warm, soulful guitars. This collection is the soundtrack to golden hours, road trips, coffee dates, and everything that feels like a deep breath.

crimeandnoir.description_text: Need to build a world of crime and suspense? This layers the harsh clang of jail—distant screams, klaxon buzzers, jangling keys—with the focused quiet of a police station and the sterile hum of a forensic lab. The constant buzz of a dot matrix printer, sharp radio chatter, and unsettling musical drones complete the gritty, procedural atmosphere.

fantasyworldambienceloops_ruralritual_sf.description_text: Layer gentle winds through quiet fields, the distant chatter of a contented barnyard, and the steady rhythm of rain on a farmhouse roof. This is the authentic, pastoral calm of the countryside.

scififorkids.description_text: "Sci-Fi for Kids" is playful, quirky and whimsical for young explorers. This collection mixes cheerful reggae, cartoonish percussion, and mischievous melodies perfect for alien classroom antics, clumsy robot companions, and adventures in a vibrant, friendly cosmos. Think discovery, giggles, and imagination.

percussiontrailer_audiohero.description_text: No melodies. No mercy. Just 25 tracks of hard-hitting, pulse-pounding percussion built for battle. From anxious, industrial rhythms and hostile, threatening beats to defiant, aggressive strikes and intense, building tension — this is the sound of a standoff, a chase, an escape, or a last stand. Forget orchestral sweetness. These drums mean war.

uishaping.description_text: Click. Confirm. Play. Direct player engagement with responsive digital feedback. Crisp interface beeps, tactile button clicks, immersive arcade ambience, and slick screen transitions. Perfect for menus, notifications, and HUD interactions. Design an experience players feel.

fantasyworldambienceloops_americanwest_s.description_text: The rattle of a stagecoach, the crackle of a campfire guitar tune-up, the raw energy of a vintage cattle drive. This is the gritty, authentic atmosphere of the West, with no cliché.

detectivesdossier.description_text: Shadowy. Suspenseful. Unfinished business. Tense pulses, uneasy strings, and the weight of a case that won't close. From solemn, bitter confessions to aggressive newsroom chases and stealthy night moves, this is the sound of cracked leather chairs, cold coffee, and one last lead. Perfect for crime docs, mystery podcasts, thriller trailers, and creators who deal in secrets, lies, and slow-burn tension. Trust no one.

romanticandemotional_audiohero.description_text: Soft, tender pianos and warm strings whisper vulnerability and longing. Gentle cello lines and delicate acoustic guitars add depth and reflection. Some tracks bloom with quiet hope, others linger in bittersweet memory or sorrow. From wedding vows to farewells, first glances to last goodbyes — this is the sound of hearts on screen, scored with restraint, grace, and emotional truth.

galacticcommunicationarrays.description_text: "Galactic Communication Arrays" is a pack of otherworldly signals and sci-fi transmissions, featuring encrypted data bursts, pulsating alien beacons, and warped digital interference—crafting the sound of unknown hails, deep-space telemetry, and the mysterious language of distant technology.

orchestraldreams.description_text: This collection embodies the highest standards of musical excellence, featuring elegant minuets, dramatic symphonic movements, and profound operatic interludes. It is the definitive resource for projects requiring an air of cultivated sophistication, profound emotional depth, and unwavering prestige.

biotechandexperiments.description_text: "Biotech & Experiments" is a pack of laboratory and scientific sound effects for sci-fi. It features bubbling vats, centrifuge hums, data-stream pulses, and ominous machinery—crafting the sterile, precise, and sometimes unnerving atmosphere of research labs, alien autopsies, and experimental biotech facilities.

culturesofthespiralarm.description_text: "Cultures of the Spiral Arm" is a world music collection for building alien societies and intergalactic cultures. This collection blends earthy textures—from ceremonial African drums and meditative Asian flutes to Celtic pipes and Latin grooves—to score vibrant alien marketplaces, serene diplomatic encounters, and the distinct spirit of civilizations across the stars. Perfect for grounded, character-rich sci-fi with soul.

acousticrock_audiohero.description_text: Forty professionally crafted acoustic rock tracks designed for broadcast, corporate, and commercial applications. Featuring warm, well-mixed guitars, solid rhythmic foundations, and tasteful arrangements that avoid overproduction. The collection spans upbeat, driving anthems suitable for promotional content and lifestyle branding, as well as more restrained, introspective ballads for narrative-driven projects.

interviewsandstorytelling_audiohero.description_text: A curated collection of 20 atmospheric sounds perfect for enhancing interviews and narrative projects. Features vintage vibraphone accents, subtle whooshes, library ambience, sci-fi tones, and delicate glass sounds. Ideal for documentaries, podcasts, or adding vintage/ethereal flavor to stories.

hauntedharmonies.description_text: Haunted Harmonies is a symphony of shadow and spectacle, merging brutal orchestral force with eerie, supernatural atmosphere. From apocalyptic battles and cursed revelations to sinister magic shows and heroic struggles against the void, this collection is forged for epic horror, dark fantasy, and trailers where light fights to survive the fall.

retrorevival.description_text: A time capsule of classic cool, blending swaggering '80s rock, pulsing synthwave, and iconic TV themes. From confident intros and tense detective cues to smooth tropical escapes, this collection is your secret weapon for throwback commercials, retro gaming, and content that demands authentic vintage flair. Rewind the clock. Make it classic.

soniccrafting.description_text: A sound designer's essential arsenal of precision and texture. This delivers raw, modular components—harsh zaps, turbulent whooshes, and gritty risers. Sculpt unique moments with LFE-driven feedback, glitched accents, and metallic stings. Build everything from sci-fi interfaces to visceral impacts. For the architects of sound.

paralleldimensionsanddriftenergy.description_text: Parallel Dimensions & Drift Energy – an SFX pack of unstable reality. Get portal whooshes, tonal oscillations, and heavy modulations for alternate timelines, unstable rifts, and sci-fi experiments with time and space.

fantasyworldambienceloops_middleeast_asi.human_name: World Ambiences: Middle East & Asian Sounds
fantasyworldambienceloops_middleeast_asi.description_text: You'll hear the sacred resonance of large Islamic bowls and temple bells, the focused energy of small groups chanting in Arabic, and the distant, solemn prayers of monks. It moves from the vibrant, crowded atmosphere of a Hebrew and Arabic marketplace to the intense, seething energy of a large exterior crowd. The sounds range from intimate, pointed conversations and laughter to the vast, dynamic winds of the desert—capturing the region's profound spiritual depth and vibrant public life.

quietbetweenstars.description_text: "The Quiet Between Stars" is a smooth jazz and ambient sound set for introspective sci-fi moments. This collection of cool piano, smoky bass lines, and intimate ballads scores the quiet human connections in deep space—lonely station bars, late-night contemplation, and the soulful undercurrent of life aboard a long-haul starship.

featurefilmfestival.description_text: From bittersweet solo piano and brooding western regret to spacey, contemplative drones and subtle romantic undertones, it’s the essential score for character-driven dramas, festival shorts, and narratives that thrive on raw, emotional authenticity. Tell the quiet stories.

emotionalbuilding_audiohero.description_text: Beginnings are tender, hesitant, often uncertain — pianos and strings whispering doubt, loss, or longing. Then, gradually, something shifts. Layers accumulate. Percussion enters. Melodies rise. Hope doesn't arrive suddenly — it builds. These tracks understand that healing, grief, love, and recovery take time. Perfect for narratives that respect emotional complexity and the slow work of becoming whole.

industrialandmechanical.description_text: Raw factory energy. Heavy machinery roar, stamping presses, clanking pipes, and hissing gas lines. From massive production halls to empty, dripping warehouses—this is the sound of steel, steam, and sweat. Perfect for dystopian worlds, cyberpunk scenes, tech breakdowns, and any creator who wants their content to hit with industrial weight. No polish. Just power.

lightcomedy_audiohero.description_text: Sneaky pizzicato strings, wobbly ragtime pianos, and clumsy chase scenes. Saucy jazz, hipster whistling, and circus daredevils with no net. This collection doesn't take itself seriously—and neither should you. Perfectly timed pratfalls, raised eyebrows, and that "oops" moment we've all been there. Slapstick sketches, quirky vlogs, animated bloopers, and creators who know when to wink at the camera. No drama. Just giggles.

isolatedandlonely.description_text: This collection crafts a profound sense of isolation and haunting atmosphere. It moves from the lonely, fluorescent hum of a late-night gas station to the eerie, empty drones of alien hives and cavernous industrial spaces. Layer in the dissonant ambience of rainy city alleys, the distant echo of an empty hallway, and the isolated rumble of a dormant volcano for deeply atmospheric, melancholic scenes.

podcastcreatorsfx.description_text: This 50-track collection covers it all: ambient backgrounds like city traffic, forest birds, desert wind, and airport bustle; everyday sounds like keyboard typing, camera clicks, doorbells, and footsteps on dirt and concrete; plus punchy production elements including game show buzzers, dramatic symphonic hits, suspense accents, magic sparkles, crowd applause, thunder crashes, glass breaks, explosions, and even a 9 mm handgun shot. Whether you're telling true crime, storytelling fiction, comedy, or commentary, these sound effects add instant energy and immersion.

crowdscenespositive.description_text: Listen to a curated set of positive human responses, from the sharp, collective gasp of surprise and light, contagious laughter to energetic cheers and supportive "yeahs." Perfect for studio audiences, courtroom victories, or any scene needing a genuine lift, it captures the immediate, positive energy of a engaged group.

household_sfx.description_text: The sound of living. Raw, real, and uncomfortably close. Toaster pops, scissors snip, keys drop, and the refrigerator breathes in the dark. From buzzing doorbells and ringing flip phones to hissing gas stoves and grinding coffee machines—this isn't a home makeover. It's the messy, mechanical, sometimes annoying pulse of everyday life. Perfect for ASMR, relatable creator skits, horror hidden in plain sight, or anyone who wants to make the ordinary feel loud. Welcome home.

christmasandholiday_audiohero.description_text: Warm. Nostalgic. Joyfully familiar. Jingle bells, silent nights, and sugar plum fairies. Triumphant choruses, gentle lullabies, and playful elf antics. Crackling fireplaces, sparkling music boxes, and the quiet magic of snowfall. This collection captures every shade of the season—from solemn reverence to exuberant celebration. Holiday content, family videos, retail playlists, and creators spreading cheer.

storyscapes.description_text: Real stories need real feeling — not overproduced Hollywood bombast. This collection is for the quiet moments, the honest conversations, the slow walks through old neighborhoods. Fifty tracks of gentle pianos, warm strings, mellow guitars, and understated electronics that breathe instead of push. Hopeful but not cheesy.

alienjam.description_text: Alien Jam – a playlist of otherworldly life. Get alien creature growls, insectoid chirps, heavy alien breaths, and interdimensional snarls. Soundtrack your xenomorph hive, jungle planet ambush, or first contact gone wrong.

cozyandsafe.description_text: This collection builds atmosphere with the gentle crackle of a fireplace, the soft patter of rain against a window, and the peaceful rhythm of a steady stream. Layer in the distant rumble of a highway from a cozy cabin, the delicate sound of falling autumn leaves, and the subtle textures of a grassy room tone to create deeply tranquil, reassuring environments.

gamedevelopersfx.description_text: Explosions, creatures, drones - oh my! Bring big-budget quality to your game with the Game Developer Sound Effects Pack. This treasure trove of assets lets you craft immersive worlds that pop. With dark, gritty audio like shatters and impacts, you can amp up the action. Cinematic whooshes build suspense during stealth scenes. And vocalizations, pulsing tones, and eerie ambiances set an unsettling mood. The pack includes 50 clips of: hard-hitting combat sounds, sci-fi tones for high-tech scenes, creature vocals that send chills, cracks, rumbles, and booms, drones, risers, and swells.

retrofutures.description_text: "Retro Futures" is a collection of vintage synth and lo-fi cues for classic, low-budget sci-fi atmosphere. This bundle captures the eerie, analog charm of 70s/80s sci-fi with pulsing electronics, suspenseful drones, and cassette-tape tension—perfect for cosmic mysteries, eerie alien signals, and nostalgic space exploration.

transportationandmotion.description_text:
From rumbling subway tunnels and bustling train stations to the hum of city buses and Venice’s water taxis — this playlist captures the heartbeat of global transit.

Each track drops you into real motion: airport crowds, street traffic with police horses, windy terminals, and even a Buenos Aires bus ride.

Perfect for filmmakers, game designers, or anyone needing authentic, immersive transportation ambience with character and depth.

vloglifeessentials_audiohero.description_text: The secret sauce for authentic content! Get real-life sounds every creator needs: camera shutter clicks for travel vlogs, coffee machine bubbles for morning routines, gym sounds for fitness content, and fancy champagne pops for celebration scenes. Perfect for content creators who want their videos to feel alive and unscripted. No more fake stock sounds – just real moments captured.

cartoon.description_text: Silly. Chaotic. Gloriously unhinged. Boings, slide whistles, rubbery sproings, and xylophone trills that defy logic. Magical sparkles. Falling anvils. Squeaky horn toots. Chipmunk giggles. This isn't subtle—it's the sound of someone getting hit in the face with a pie, shaking it off, and doing it again. Animation, comedy sketches, meme content, game night intros, creators who aren't afraid to look ridiculous. No rules. No dignity. Just fun.

deepspacephenomena.description_text: Deep Space Phenomena" is a sound design toolkit for sci-fi isolation and cosmic mystery. This collection features sonar pings, deep drones, garbled transmissions, and metallic echoes to build immersive ambiences of derelict ships, alien signals, and the unnerving silence between stars. Perfect for atmospheric tension and world-building in the void.

celebrationandfestivity.description_text: Explosive New Year’s cheers, car-honking street festivals, bustling Christmas malls, and the walla of packed pubs. Layer in the iconic pop of champagne and the roaring crowd of a stadium to build instantly festive, high-energy scenes.

1download_ocac.description_text: Get access to over 300,000 tracks of royalty-free music and sound effects with Tier 1, which gives you one track of your choice for your next project.

electropop_audiohero.description_text: This electro pop music playlist features a dynamic mix of uplifting, modern house, trap, ethereal, electronic, and inspirational dance music. With a fusion of different genres, this playlist offers a diverse range of tracks that are perfect for creating a lively and energetic atmosphere. Whether you're looking to get pumped up for a workout or simply want to elevate your mood, this playlist is sure to keep you moving and grooving!

scifilabs.description_text: "Sci-Fi Labs" is a group of sounds for futuristic labs. It includes bubbling experiments, humming machines, laser zaps, and the noise of lab disasters—perfect for building a science outpost in space.

analoghorizonsinvhs.description_text: "Analog Horizons in VHS" is a retro synth & rock set for gritty, vintage sci-fi. This collection captures the raw, pulsing energy of 80s-inspired synthtracks and confident guitar riffs—perfect for analog spacecraft, low-tech cybernetics, and cassette-future adventures. Think cathode-ray mysteries and synthwave heroics.

legendsoftheroundtable.description_text: An earth-stained Celtic anthems and haunting medieval elegies. From raw, percussive pagan rhythms and mournful pipe melodies to noble, battle-worn resolve, this is the score for a darker epic—think brutal strategy games, gritty historical dramas, and fantasy with blood on its sword.

inspirational.description_text: This collection is the soundtrack to victory—bold anthems for big dreams, quiet resolve for the long climb, and explosive releases for the moment you make it. Corporate presentations, sports highlights, documentary climaxes, and anyone chasing something greater. No quitting. Just rising.

spaceandvoid.description_text: "Space & Void" is a pack of cosmic ambiences and stellar atmospheres, featuring weightless drones, solar wind howls, and distant stellar rumbles. This builds the vast, haunting soundscape of deep space, from desolate planetary surfaces to the silent presence of distant stars.

rockrage.description_text: Built for high-octane sports highlights, intense gameplay montages, and any scene that demands raw, unfiltered power. This is the sound of rebellion, competition, and pure adrenaline. Smash the ceiling.

grandfleet.description_text: "The Grand Fleet" is an epic orchestral list for colossal sci-fi warfare and naval might. This collection features majestic brass, thunderous percussion, and heroic marches—perfect for massive fleet deployments, historic space battles, and the awe-inspiring spectacle of an interstellar armada.

make_a_wish.description_text:
Donations to support Make-A-Wish are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

Make-A-Wish® creates life-changing wishes for children with critical illnesses. We seek to bring every eligible child's wish to life because a wish is an integral part of a child's treatment journey. Research shows children who have wishes granted can build the physical and emotional strength they need to fight their illness. Headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, Make-A-Wish is the world’s leading children’s wish-granting organization, serving children in more than 50 countries worldwide. Together, generous donors, supporters, staff and more than 40,000 volunteers, grant a wish every 17 minutes, on average, somewhere in the world. Since 1980, Make-A-Wish has granted nearly 450,000 wishes to children; more than 30,000 last year alone. For more information about Make-A-Wish International, visit worldwish.org and for more information about Make-A-Wish America, visit wish.org.

databricksfundamentals_buildarock-solidf.human_name: Databricks Fundamentals - Build a Rock-Solid Foundation for Certifications with 10 Practice Exams
databricksfundamentals_buildarock-solidf.description_text:
Before you pursue any Databricks certification, you need to actually understand the platform.

thrivinginandroiddevelopmentusingkotlin.human_name: Thriving in Android Development Using Kotlin
thrivinginandroiddevelopmentusingkotlin.description_text:
Key Features

  • Understand complex concepts in a coherent way by solving challenging real-world problems and developing three practical projects
  • Use the latest features of libraries in Jetpack Compose, Room, CameraX, ExoPlayer, and more
  • Leverage best practices for UI creation, app structure, data handling, and lifecycle management
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

If you're a mid-level Android engineer, this book is for you as it will not only teach you how to solve issues that occur in real-world apps but also benefit you in your day-to-day work. This book will also help junior engineers who want to get exposed to complex problems and explore best practices to solve them. A basic understanding of Android and Kotlin concepts such as views, activities, lifecycle, and Kotlin coroutines will be useful to get the most out of this book.

agenticcodingwithclaudecode.description_text:
Key Features

  • Learn Claude Code as a development partner to build custom automations and agentic workflows
  • Build and iterate on a Next.js application using Claude Code for AI-assisted development
  • Scale AI-assisted development with Claude Code while maintaining code quality

Who this book is for

This book is for developers and engineers who want to move beyond chat-based AI and build agentic, automated development workflows using Claude Code and MCP.

It is ideal for application developers with prior software engineering experience who want to integrate context-aware AI agents into their terminal and IDE, automate complex tasks, and design scalable multi-agent systems. It will also benefit AI engineers and GenAI users working closely with modern development workflows.

flutterdesignpatternsandbestpractices.human_name: Flutter Design Patterns and Best Practices
flutterdesignpatternsandbestpractices.description_text:
Key Features

  • Cover code structure, app architecture, testing, performance optimization, error handling, and more
  • Get hands on with code examples and exercises to apply design patterns and best practices in real-world scenarios
  • Leverage the intricacies of the Flutter framework to build better apps for your clients
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

If you’re a mobile developer who has already realized the potential of Flutter as a tool to solve business problems and are looking forward to leveling up your app-building skills, then this book is for you. Freelancers, agencies, or individuals who have already developed basic applications with Flutter and want to level up their skills to build production-ready apps at scale will find this book helpful. Basic Flutter knowledge and experience in building apps will be beneficial. Moreover, if you’re transitioning from another mobile framework, this book will make the transition easier.

developers.developer-name: Daria Orlova; Esra Kadah; Jaime Blasco

designingandprototypinginterfaceswithfig.human_name: Designing and Prototyping Interfaces with Figma
designingandprototypinginterfaceswithfig.description_text:
Key Features

  • Third edition of the bestselling book, updated with a new project, refreshed interface, and the latest design trends
  • Build adaptive, production-ready UIs with variables, modes, components, variants, AI, and Auto Layout
  • Prototype branched flows with conditional interactions and interactive components

Who this book is for

This book is for aspiring UX/UI designers who want to get started with Figma as well as established designers who want to migrate to Figma from other design tools. This guide will provide you with a walkthrough of the entire process of creating a full-fledged prototype for a responsive interface using all the tools and features that Figma has to offer. As a result, this book is suitable for both UX and UI designers, product and graphic designers, as well as anyone who wants to explore the complete design process from scratch.

designbeyondlimitswithfigma.description_text:
Key Features

  • Level up into a highly sought-after designer through expert techniques and battle-tested workflows
  • Learn faster with a hands-on guide built around practical, recipe-based approach.
  • Put Al to work in Figma with workflows that speed up content, assets, and cleanup while saving hours
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

This book is written for UX and UI designers who already have a basic understanding of Figma and want to advance beyond the fundamentals. Product managers and developers who work closely with design teams will also benefit from learning design practices, building scalable systems and better collaboration practices.

masteringswift6.description_text:
Key Features

  • Perfect your application development capabilities using the latest features of Swift 6.2
  • Learn advanced techniques like concurrency, memory management, Generics, and Swift Testing
  • Apply best practices in Swift to write clean, scalable, and maintainable code
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

This book is for developers who have a fundamental grasp of the Swift language and aspire to take their development skills to the next level by learning about the advanced topics and techniques of the Swift language. All examples are compatible with Linux, in addition to the MacOS, iOS, iPadOS, VisionOS, and WatchOS platforms, unless otherwise noted.

netmauicross-platformapplicationdevelopm.description_text:
Key Features

  • Handle data effectively with expanded coverage on the MVVM model and data binding
  • Integrate platform-specific code using plugins and custom controls
  • Migrate from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI for the latest hybrid app development capabilities

Who this book is for

This book is for mobile developers interested in cross-platform application development with working experience of the .NET Core framework, as well as junior engineers who’ve just begun their career in mobile app development. Native app developers (desktop) or Xamarin developers who want to migrate to .NET MAUI will also benefit from this book. Basic knowledge of modern object-oriented programming languages, such as C#, Java or Kotlin, is assumed.

superchargedcodingwithgenai.description_text:
Key Features

  • Discover how GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and the OpenAI API can boost your coding productivity
  • Push beyond the basics to apply advanced techniques across the software development lifecycle
  • Master best practices and advanced techniques to achieve quality code for even complex tasks
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

If you are a Python developer curious about GenAI and are looking to elevate your software engineering productivity, Supercharged Coding with GenAI will transform your approach to software. Covering various structured examples of varying problem complexities that showcase the use of advanced prompting techniques, this book is suitable for early intermediate through advanced developers. To get the most out of this book, you should have at least one year of hands-on Python development experience and be somewhat familiar with the SDLC.

developers.developer-name: Hila Paz Herszfang; Peter V. Henstock; Mike Erlihson; Alice Fridberg

aiforcreativeproduction.description_text:
Key Features

  • Master AI-powered workflows for editing video, enhancing audio, and improving text and images
  • Discover the potential of AI automation tools to make your creative workflow faster and more efficient
  • Boost your creativity with a view to navigating ethical and copyright challenges

Who this book is for

This book is for creative professionals, photographers, digital creators, video editors, writers, and enthusiasts who want to understand and apply AI in their work. Readers should already be comfortable with digital creative tools in at least one medium and ready to explore more. Whether you’re seeking to enhance productivity, explore generative creativity, or navigate ethical questions, this book offers clear, practical guidance.

reactandreactnative_fifthedition.description_text:
Key Features

  • New content on TypeScript, React frameworks, state management strategies, and unit testing
  • Get to grips with React fundamentals and modern React techniques and architecture
  • Broaden your React expertise through mobile development with React Native

Who this book is for

This book is for any JavaScript or TypeScript developer who wants to start learning how to use React and React Native for web and mobile app development.

No prior knowledge of React or React Native is required. However, a working knowledge of JavaScript is necessary to be able to follow along the content covered.

swiftuicookbook_3rdedition.description_text:
Key Features

  • Unlock advanced controls and animations with SwiftUI 5, taking your app development skills to the next level
  • Visualize data effortlessly using Swift Charts enhancing your app's data-driven capabilities
  • Develop for multiple platforms, including iOS, macOS, and watchOS, and become a versatile app developer
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

This book is for mobile developers who want to learn SwiftUI as well as experienced iOS developers transitioning from UIKit to SwiftUI. The book assumes knowledge of the Swift programming language. Knowledge of object-oriented design and data structures will be useful but not necessary. You'll also find this book to be a helpful resource if you're looking for reference material regarding the implementation of various features in SwiftUI.

vibecodingwithcursorwindsurfandlovable.human_name: Vibe Coding with Cursor, Windsurf, and Lovable
vibecodingwithcursorwindsurfandlovable.description_text:
Key Features

  • Master the emerging vibe coding mindset for AI-assisted software development
  • Build and deploy complete applications using Cursor, Windsurf, and Lovable
  • Apply real-world development practices including specifications, testing, version control, and CI-style workflows

Who this book is for

This book is for beginners curious about building apps without coding every line, developers who want to prototype faster and guide AI effectively, and anyone interested in how AI is transforming the entire software development process.

masteringios18development.description_text:
Key Features

  • Stay up to date with the latest changes and improvements in iOS SDK and Swift programming language
  • Learn how you can improve user experience by focusing on customizing components and animations
  • Get to grips with advanced topics such as SwiftData and high-efficiency applications through an in-depth discussion
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

If you are an experienced iOS developer looking to enhance your mobile development skills, create exceptional applications, and excel in advanced positions, this book is designed for you. To derive maximum benefit from this book and ensure a strong understanding of the advanced content, it is recommended that you have a solid foundation in Swift, SwiftUI, and Xcode.

howtobuildandroidapplicationswithkotlin.human_name: How to Build Android Applications with Kotlin
howtobuildandroidapplicationswithkotlin.description_text:
Key Features

  • Build real-world Android apps with Kotlin and the Jetpack Compose UI framework
  • Leverage the latest libraries to accelerate your Android development
  • Overcome development challenges with tips and tricks from experienced Android professionals
  • Get With Your Book: PDF Copy, AI Assistant, and Next-Gen Reader Free

Who this book is for

This book is for beginners as well as intermediate-level developers with no prior experience in Android app development. Basic knowledge of the Kotlin programming language or experience in a similar programming language, along with a willingness to brush up on Kotlin is required.

developers.developer-name: Alex Forrester; Eran Boudjnah; Alexandru Dumbravan; Jomar Tigcal

ios26programmingforbeginners.description_text:
Key Features

  • Have fun building your first iOS app and start your iOS programming career
  • Learn to integrate Apple Intelligence and the sleek new Liquid Glass UI for modern app experiences
  • Establish a solid foundation with UIKit, testing, and deployment best practices

Who this book is for

This iOS programming book is for beginners with minimal coding experience who want to enter the world of Swift programming and iOS app development. A basic understanding of programming concepts is all you need to get started.

101uxprinciples_2ndedition.description_text:
Key Features

  • Browse over 20 years of collected UX insights
  • Challenge your own ideas on UX
  • Join the online community of UX professionals and learn with the experts

Who this book is for

This book is a distillation of Will's 20+ years of experience in the form of successful design principles to help early career UX designers learn the ropes and provide experienced professionals with new ideas when building their products.

UX/UI designers, product managers, entrepreneurs, aspiring strategists, and anyone creating a digital product, service or a campaign will find this book extremely useful.

swiftcookbook_3rdedition.description_text:
Key Features

  • Harness the power of Swift to create stunning applications, spanning mobile apps to machine learning models
  • Learn and practice the flexible Swift programming language with a practical, recipe-based approach
  • Leverage highly tested recipes that any Swift developer can follow in this part-color guide

Who this book is for

This book is for experienced iOS developers looking to master the diverse features offered by Swift 5.9 along with tips and tricks to efficiently code and build applications. Knowledge of general programming concepts will assist with understanding key concepts.

developers.developer-name: Keith Moon; Chris Barker; Daniel Bolella; Nathan Lawlor

designinginformationarchitecture.description_text:
Key Features

  • Learn IA from Pabini Gabriel-Petit, UX expert and founder of UXmatters
  • Get a practical introduction to IA in the broader context of UX research and design
  • Gain expert insights from industry leaders on IA’s evolution, techniques, and applications
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

This complete reference is for both experienced and aspiring information architects and UX design professionals who are looking to create effective information architectures for digital information spaces, including Web sites, applications, and intranets. It is also a valuable resource for members of product teams—especially developers, product managers, and other UX professionals who collaborate closely with information architects—and other stakeholders who want to understand and support the information-architecture workflow.

microsoftpowerappscookbook.description_text:
Key Features

  • Explore how to build apps without custom IT development
  • Accelerate development with the AI-powered Microsoft Copilot as your virtual app making partner
  • Create intuitive and responsive interfaces with canvas app UI elements

Who this book is for

This book is targeted at information workers and app makers wanting to develop custom applications for their organizations or the projects they are undertaking. Traditional app developers will also find this book useful by discovering how to use a rapid application development environment with increased productivity and speed. Readers are expected to have prior exposure to the Microsoft Power Platform ecosystem.

againstmalariafoundation.description_text:
Donations to support Against Malaria Foundation are made to  PayPal Giving Fund, subject to its policies.

The Against Malaria Foundation helps protect people from malaria. They fund anti-malaria nets, specifically long-lasting insecticidal nets (LLINs), and work with distribution partners to ensure they are used.

inclusivedesignforaccessibility.description_text:
Key Features

  • Understand inclusive design principles that will help you achieve universal usability
  • Gain insights into AI and emerging technologies shaping the future of accessibility
  • Drive organizational change with practical strategies to build an inclusive design culture
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

This book is for digital designers, developers, UX professionals, product managers, and business leaders committed to inclusive design. It offers practical skills for creating accessible digital products, while covering legal and ethical considerations, user research, and strategies for building an accessibility-focused culture within teams.

You don’t need to be an expert in UX design, web development, or accessibility to get value from this book. Each chapter delivers actionable insights that stand on their own, be it UX design, product management, development, or accessibility leadership.

developers.developer-name: Dale Cruse; Denis Boudreau; Glenda Sims

aniosdevelopersguidetoswiftui.human_name: An iOS Developer's Guide to SwiftUI
aniosdevelopersguidetoswiftui.description_text:

  • Learn how to structure and maintain clean app architecture
  • Under the guidance of industry expert Michele Fadda, build well-structured, maintainable, and high-performance applications
  • Understand the declarative functional approach and focus on asynchronous programming within the context of SwiftUI

Who this book is for

– This book is for iOS developers interested in mastering SwiftUI, software developers with extensive iOS development experience using UIkit transitioning to SwiftUI, as well as mobile consultants and engineers who want to gain an in-depth understanding of the framework.

– Newcomers equipped with knowledge of Swift, UIkit, XCode, and asynchronous programming will find this book invaluable for launching a career in mobile software development with iOS.

flutterforbeginners_4thedition.description_text:
Key Features

  • Familiarize yourself with Dart and Flutter fundamentals through practical, real-world examples
  • Explore widgets, animations, and plugins to craft intuitive UIs
  • Package and deploy your Flutter apps to achieve native-like performance
  • Purchase of the print or Kindle book includes a free PDF eBook

Who this book is for

This book is for developers looking to learn Google's revolutionary framework Flutter from scratch. No prior knowledge of Flutter or Dart is required.
